action.reasoning: Observation: Latest (iter17) with mem=1000/task+more epochs got 0.5828 (vs best 0.594 from iter16 mem=500, epochs=6, consol=5). Task9 train acc~0.05 (underfitting on combined data), val drops to ~0.077 then recovers to 0.596 in consolidation; dense logs now present, task accs balanced but some middle tasks lag. Analysis: Larger mem+epochs caused convergence issues (lr/scheduler mismatch on big buffer); replay(500)+KD(0.5/T=2)+consol+best-val selection proven at 0.59 with good curves. Root cause of prior drops was truncation (now avoided by full rewrite). Decision: Rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated train.py using best-run params (mem=550/task balanced via meta+torch, epochs/task=6, consol=6@1e-4, Adam(5e-4,wd=1e-5), KD beta=0.5 T=2.0 with proper KLDiv on softmax, CosineAnnealingLR reset per-task, dense logging every 20 steps+val/best per epoch, deepcopy old_model, final best ckpt as {'model_state_dict':...}). Keep model.py/predict.py. This should recover+exceed 0.594 targeting >0.60 avg_acc. Run training then submit_eval.
